name: MediaCreateSourceReaderFromURL
title: MediaCreateSourceReaderFromURL
description: Creates the source reader from a URL.
For more information regarding the source reader see source reader.

parameters.name: mediaFileUrl
parameters.description: The URL of a media file to open. For a list of supported media formats in files see supported media formats.

return: 0: The function failed. Call MediaGetLastError to get a more specific error code.
